mapper.select: SELECT * FROM forum_tags ORDER BY post_count DESC
SELECT * FROM forum_tags WHERE LOWER(name) = LOWER(#{name})
mapper.update: UPDATE forum_tags SET name=#{name}, post_count=#{postCount} WHERE id=#{id}
UPDATE forum_tags SET post_count = post_count + 1 WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE forum_tags SET post_count = GREATEST(0, post_count - 1) WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT t.*, fpt.post_id AS post_id FROM forum_tags t INNER JOIN forum_post_tags fpt ON t.id = fpt.tag_id WHERE fpt.post_id IN #{pid}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM forum_post_tags WHERE post_id = #{postId} AND tag_id = #{tagId}
